name: Marcus Chen
key_complexity: Single employer, standard deduction, no state income tax
narrative: Marcus is a straightforward filer — one W-2 from his employer, standard deduction, lives in Texas (no state income tax). His documents come in the formats you'd expect from a tech worker: PDF W-2 from his employer's payroll system, bank statements downloaded as CSV, and a prior year return as a PDF from TurboTax.
